```{r cross_normalization_comparison}
          normalizations = paste(normalization, collapse = ", "),
          mean_estimate = mean(estimate),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) %>%
        arrange(desc(n_normalizations), desc(abs(mean_estimate)))
      
      comparison_results[[analysis_type]] <- list(
        combined = combined_results,
        overlap = overlap_summary
      )
      
      # Print overlap statistics
      cat("  Total unique associations:", nrow(overlap_summary), "\n")
      cat("  Consistent across normalizations:", sum(overlap_summary$n_normalizations > 1), "\n")
    }
  }
  
  return(comparison_results)
}

# Perform comparison
normalization_comparison <- compare_normalizations(significant_results)

# Create comparison plots
for (analysis_type in names(normalization_comparison)) {
  overlap_data <- normalization_comparison[[analysis_type]]$overlap
  
  if (nrow(overlap_data) > 0) {
    # Create overlap barplot
    overlap_plot <- ggplot(overlap_data, aes(x = factor(n_normalizations))) +
      geom_bar(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Normalization Overlap -", analysis_type),
        x = "Number of Normalizations",
        y = "Number of Associations"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
    
    # Save plot
    save_pdf_figure(paste0("normalization_overlap_", analysis_type, ".pdf"), 
                   width_mm = 120, height_mm = 100)
    print(overlap_plot)
    dev.off()
  }
}

# Save comparison results
saveRDS(normalization_comparison, 
        file.path(intermediate_files_path, "normalization_comparison.rds"))
```

# 9. Integration with GOLD Database Features

```{r gold_database_integration}
cat("🏆 Integrating results with GOLD database features...\n")

# Function to add GOLD features to results
add_gold_features <- function(results_df, genus_mapping) {
  # Convert dependent_var (OTU) to genus mapping
  results_with_gold <- results_df %>%
    left_join(genus_mapping, by = c("dependent_var" = "otu")) %>%
    mutate(
      # Clean genus names
      genus_clean = if_else(
        Genus == "unclassified" | is.na(Genus),
        paste0("NA; ", str_remove(dependent_var, "^RSV_")),
        Genus
      )
    )
  
  return(results_with_gold)
}

# Add GOLD features to all significant results
gold_integrated_results <- list()

for (analysis_key in names(significant_results)) {
  results_df <- significant_results[[analysis_key]]
  
  # Add GOLD features
  results_with_gold <- add_gold_features(results_df, ubiome_genus_mapping_complete)
  
  gold_integrated_results[[analysis_key]] <- results_with_gold
  
  # Summary of GOLD feature coverage
  gold_coverage <- results_with_gold %>%
    summarise(
      total_associations = n(),
      with_gold_features = sum(!is.na(OXYGEN_REQUIREMENT)),
      coverage_percent = round(100 * sum(!is.na(OXYGEN_REQUIREMENT)) / n(), 1)
    )
  
  cat("📊", analysis_key, "- GOLD coverage:", gold_coverage$coverage_percent, "%\n")
}

# Create GOLD feature summary plots
create_gold_feature_plot <- function(integrated_results, feature_name) {
  # Combine all results
  all_results <- bind_rows(integrated_results, .id = "analysis_key")
  
  # Filter for the specific feature
  feature_data <- all_results %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[feature_name]])) %>%
    count(analysis_key, .data[[feature_name]], name = "n_associations") %>%
    mutate(normalization = str_extract(analysis_key, "(none|clr|lognorm)$"))
  
  if (nrow(feature_data) > 0) {
    ggplot(feature_data, aes(x = .data[[feature_name]], y = n_associations, fill = normalization)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", alpha = 0.7) +
      facet_wrap(~analysis_key, scales = "free") +
      labs(
        title = paste("GOLD Feature Distribution:", feature_name),
        x = feature_name,
        y = "Number of Associations"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8)
      )
  } else {
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Generate GOLD feature plots
gold_features_to_plot <- c("OXYGEN_REQUIREMENT", "GRAM_STAIN", "MOTILITY", "SPORULATION")

for (feature in gold_features_to_plot) {
  if (feature %in% names(ubiome_genus_mapping_complete)) {
    gold_plot <- create_gold_feature_plot(gold_integrated_results, feature)
    
    if (!is.null(gold_plot)) {
      save_pdf_figure(paste0("gold_feature_", tolower(feature), ".pdf"), 
                     width_mm = 250, height_mm = 180)
      print(gold_plot)
      dev.off()
      cat("✅ GOLD feature plot saved for", feature, "\n")
    }
  }
}

# Save integrated results
saveRDS(gold_integrated_results, 
        file.path(intermediate_files_path, "gold_integrated_results.rds"))

cat("\nAnalysis complete! All results saved to:", intermediate_files_path, "\n")
```

## **Summary**

This updated pipeline:

1. **✅ Loads 5 phyloseq objects** with proper normalization matching
2. **✅ Uses 12 specific pipeline combinations** as specified  
3. **✅ Integrates GOLD database** features from Chapter 3
4. **✅ Uses proper column names** (`independent_var`, `dependent_var`)
5. **✅ Generates comprehensive visualizations** for each analysis
6. **✅ Performs cross-normalization comparisons**
7. **✅ Creates both original and normalized versions** of all plots

### **Key Updates Made:**
- Replaced hardcoded file paths with new structure
- Updated to use pre-processed GOLD mapping 
- Implemented proper normalization matching
- Added comprehensive visualization functions
- Created comparison across normalizations
- Integrated functional annotation capabilities
